examples: Four years ago, Joel Kline gave up his job as a magazine editor to become a freelance copywriter for advertisements, but now he had money trouble.
This is where the smart copywriter becomes a marketer.
Kristen Fischer is a copywriter and author from New Jersey.
Kelly Watson is a marketing consultant and freelance copywriter who blogs at OneWomanMarketing.com.
And it sounds particularly ominous for that arch-practitioner of the persuasive arts, the copywriter.
